title: White Rabbit Collaboration - home (approx. 25 member logos incl. CERN, Fermilab, GSI, INFN, GMV, Safran, Jump Trading; 15th WR Workshop May 27-28 at CERN)

WR Collaboration R&D projects: WRS v4 (CERN+GMV; redundant field-replaceable fans/PSUs, expansion slot, 10GbE), IQD ICPT-1 holdover expansion board, open production test suite (GMV/CERN/Safran/SyncTech); no extended-temp field-node or fleet-management program listed

WR Network for LHAASO: >8,000 detectors over 1.3 km2, 550+ WR switches in three layers, 4,410 m altitude, modified WRS -20 to +70 C, automatic link-delay/temperature compensation, fully operating since 2021; SyncTechnology hardware credited

CERN KT Highlights 2024: WR Collaboration 8 to 18 members in one year; GMV GBP 2M Innovate UK for WRS v4 commercialization; IQD quantum-clock holdover board; UNH-IOL NSF-funded testing committee; four finance members (Deutsche Boerse, Quincy Data, Jump Trading, Liquid-Markets)

Safran WR-ZEN TP-FL: standalone WR node, 1U 444x43x221 mm, -10 to +50 C, sub-ns accuracy, >80 km fiber, optional holdover module, new Low Jitter hardware version; finance/defense/5G/science applications; price not listed
Safran acquires Orolia (2022-07-08): Orolia >435 employees, approx. EUR 100M revenue; atomic clocks, time servers, GNSS resilience; price not disclosed
Orolia signs agreement to acquire Seven Solutions (announced 2021-10-25, Granada, Spain; closed Dec 2021; price undisclosed) - WR sub-ns time transfer positioning for finance/5G/datacenters/defense
Eurazeo completes sale of Orolia to Safran (2022-07-08): EUR 189M cash proceeds to Eurazeo; enterprise value not disclosed; Orolia >435 employees
GMV awarded GBP 2M Innovate UK quantum-enabled PNT contract (2024-08-07) to be first to commercialize WR Switch v4, with IQD and Zyxt; UK critical-infrastructure GNSS-backup framing, export potential
DOE announces $625M over up to 5 years ($125M FY2025) renewing five NQIS Research Centers (C2QA/BNL, SQMS/FNAL, Q-NEXT/ANL, QSA/LBNL, QSC/ORNL); Q-NEXT scaling entanglement across labs and cities
EuroQCI: all 27 EU member states joined; terrestrial phase 2023-2025 (Digital Europe); 19 CEF cross-border link projects; Eagle-1 satellite late 2026; cutting-edge quantum capabilities by 2030
高海拔宇宙线观测站时钟系统WRS-FL交换机通过鉴定验收 (LHAASO WRS-FL fanless industrial WR switch passes acceptance, 2018-09-04; Tsinghua Engineering Physics developer; >500 switches planned; sub-ns/ps-class sync)

成都天奥电子时间同步系列产品 (Chengdu Spaceon SZ:002935, CETC-10 platform): NTP/PTP time servers, time-code cards, BeiDou/GPS sync modules, distribution amplifiers, military standard-time products; no WR/sub-ns SKU listed
publisher: 成都天奥电子股份有限公司 (Chengdu Spaceon Electronics)

title: VSL: Dutch national time UTC(VSL) distributed over SURF fiber by OPNT-built White Rabbit network; <5 ns time deviation, 1e-13 frequency transfer; connected Delft/Amsterdam/Nikhef/ESTEC, expanding to Eindhoven and ASTRON

NIST PNT: EO 13905 (2020-02-12) responsible use of PNT; NISTIR 8323r1 (2023-01-31) profiles; NIST special calibration service disseminating UTC(NIST) over commercial fiber independently of GPS (active)

LBNL summary of BIS 2024-09-06 IFR (89 FR, 2024-19633): quantum ECCNs 3A901/3A904/3B904/3C907-909/3D901/3E901/4A906/4D906/4E906; timing/synchronization/clock-distribution equipment not among controlled items; deemed-export GGL for D:1/D:5 persons
publisher: Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory Export Control Office

title: EPB Quantum Network (Chattanooga, est. 2022, first commercially available US quantum network, powered by Qubitekk): capacity for ten interconnected user nodes; ORNL APC run from Sept 2024; outdoor temperature/environmental disruption mitigation

Nu Quantum adopts White Rabbit inside Quantum Networking Unit (QNU) control plane (announced 2024-11-07; full QNU delivery targeted March 2025) - timing absorbed into quantum network fabric, sub-ns sync plus control/DAQ Ethernet
